mapper.select:
SELECT hpn.*, COALESCE(t.name, s.name, u.nickname, u.username) AS authorName, COALESCE(t.name, s.name, u.nickname, u.username) AS creatorName, COALESCE(t_op.name, s_op.name, u_op.nickname, u_op.username) AS operatorName FROM home_page_notice hpn LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON hpn.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u_op ON hpn.operator = u_op.id LEFT JOIN teacher t_op ON u_op.id = t_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s_op ON u_op.id = s_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type = 1
AND hpn.id = #{noticeId}
